arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: ‘MAJOR TWIST’ warning over Odegaard 2.0 as Arsenal and Chelsea plot hijack
arts.sum: As far back as September, Nypan was seen as an important January transfer target for the Red Devils, yet Ruben Amorim’s side have delayed over a deal and face the possibility of being beaten to the wonderkid by both Arsenal and Chelsea, according to GMS . Man Utd believe that they will be able to sign the teen if they bid around €17.8 million (£15m), which would make the Rosenborg starlet the second-most expensive player to come out of Norway behind only John Obi Mikel, who controversially moved to Chelsea and not Old Trafford in 2006 for €20m.

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed nightmare January transfer window blow as Marcus Rashford move 'blocked'

arts.ttl: Sources: Ruben Amorim wants defender that’s better than Trent to replace unreliable Man United ace
arts.sum: Tyrell Malacia has been out injured for Man United for some while and has only recently returned, but Ruben Amorim wants to sell the player to raise funds in order that the Red Devils can freshen up their squad in January. arts.ttl: Man Utd open talks with Barcelona over INJURED star
arts.sum: Midfielders Casemiro and Christian Eriksen are expected to leave Old Trafford this year - and perhaps this month - which means that Man Utd will have to bring in midfielders. Former Denmark international Per Frimann believes that Man Utd should replace Casemiro with Sporting CP's Morten Hjulmand, whom Ruben Amorim once described as more 'complete' than Manuel Ugarte, but his €80 million release clause makes a deal unlikely.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Napoli eye Man Utd star, Arsenal want Vlahovic, Zubimendi latest
arts.sum: Arsenal are looking to sign a striker after Gabriel Jesus suffered an ACL injury, Marcus Rashford is set to leave Manchester United and Liverpool are expected to keep hold of Trent Alexander-Arnold for at least the rest of the season
